Title: Star Wars: Rebels
Writer: Simon Kinberg, Carrie Beck, Dave Filoni
Actors: Dave Filoni, Taylor Gray, Freddie Prinze Jr.
Plot: An animated television series set between the events of Star Wars: Episode III - Revenge of the Sith (2005) and Star Wars (1977), this show takes place in a time where the Empire is securing its grip on the galaxy and hunting down the last of the Jedi Knights as a fledgling rebellion against the Empire is taking shape.
Awards: Nominated for 4 Primetime Emmys. 7 wins & 29 nominations total
